speaker: Agent
message: Hello! Thank you for calling Bank of Peril. How can I help you today?

speaker: Customer
message: Hi, I need help with my credit card. It was declined this morning.

speaker: Agent
message: I understand that must be frustrating. Let me look into your account right away.

speaker: Customer
message: Thank you. My card number is 4532-1234-5678-9012.

speaker: Agent
message: Perfect, I can see your account now. Let me check the recent transactions.

speaker: Agent
message: I can see there was a temporary hold placed on your card due to an unusual spending pattern. This is a security measure.

speaker: Customer
message: Oh, that makes sense. I did make some large purchases yesterday for a home renovation project.

speaker: Agent
message: That explains it perfectly. I'll remove the hold right now and your card should be active within 5 minutes.

speaker: Customer
message: That's wonderful! Is there anything I can do to prevent this in the future?

speaker: Agent
message: Yes, for large purchases, you can call us beforehand or use our mobile app to notify us of planned expenses.
